title: IMPv2 NotificationCreated Event
description: Published when a new live animals (IMPv2) notification draft is created. Payload reflects the minimal state known at creation time. The data section is a flattened projection of the notification — partOne is not used in the event contract.

aggregateType.description: Fixed aggregate type for notification events

eventType.description: Fully-qualified event type for created events

referenceNumber.description: The unique reference number allocated to this notification

type.description: The Type of notification that has been created

status.description: Lifecycle status — always DRAFT for a created event

consignor.description: Person or Company that sends shipment

consignee.description: Person or Company that receives shipment

importer.description: Person or Company that is importing the consignment

commodityComplement.description: At least one commodity required at creation to determine routing

commodities.description: Commodity and origin required at creation to determine field config and routing

pointOfEntry.description: Border Inspection Post or Designated Point of Entry, e.g. GBFXT1
